title: Metropolis Healthcare is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Metropolis Healthcare is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? Metropolis Healthcare in Patna offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Metropolis Healthcare:
Metropolis Healthcare is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Metropolis Healthcare!
